titleStmt.title: SII 17.442: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 442. (A.R. No. 412 of 1904.) TIRUCHIRĀPPAḶḶI, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the third pillar in the outer row of pillars in the upper rock-cut cave.
This inscription commences with the praśasti Tirumagaḷ pōla etc., of Rājarāja I.

It records a sale of land situated in Ālaṅguḍi in Viḷattūr-nāḍu, a dēvadāṉa to Kambaṉ Maṇiyaṉ alias Vikramaśiṅga Mūvēnda-vēḷāṉ, the kiḻavaṉ of Śūralūr in Śūralūr-kūṟṟam, receiving 5 kaḻañju, by the Patipādamūla-ppaṭṭuḍai-ppañchāchārya dēvakaṉmis of the temple of Tribhuvaṉapati in Śiṟṟambal—Tiruchchirāppaḷḷi in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam and the ūrār of Śiṟṟambal. The kiḻavaṉ of Śūralūr was to reclaim the land and his contribution along with the 5 kaḻañju, the price of the land deposited in the temple treasury was to be utilised for feeding Brāhmaṇas and Śivayōgis on all the nine days of the Chittirai festival.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilaccelviyum taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakko
ḷa kānta(ḷ)ḷūrc cā(l)lai kala(m)maṟuttaru(ḷ)ḷi veṅkai nāṭu kaṅ
kapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum kol
lamum kaliṅkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṟṟi taṇṭāl koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷar
Ūḻiyuḷ Ellā viyāṇṭum toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarai
ttecukoḷ śrī kovirājarājakesaripaṉmarkku yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu
Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu ciṟṟampal tiruccirāppaḷi Initiruntaruḷiya tiripūva
ṉapatikku mulabṛttyaṉāṉa taṇṭesvarap perumāḷ Aruḷāl patipātamulap
paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāṟṟiyaRead ‘pañcācāriya’ tevakaṉmikaḷomum ciṟṟampal Ūromum It
tevar tevatāṉam viḷattūr nāṭṭu Ālaṅkuṭi Uttamacoḻap perāṟṟu kiḻak
kka maṇaliṭum kaḷarum tiṭalumāyk kiṭanta nilaṉ 2 Iṉṉi
lam Iraṇṭaraiyum cūralūr kūṟṟattu cūralūṟ kiḻavaṉ kampaṉ maṇiyaṉnāṉa vik
kirama ciṅka muv(ve)otaveḷān Ittevar cittirai tirunāḷ Onpatu nāḷum brā
hmaṇarum civayokikaḷum tapasyarum Uṇṇa Ivaṉ Iṉṉilam tirutti vacakkikko
ḷḷap peṟuvāṉāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattuk kicainta kiḻpāṟ kellai tiruvaraṅ
ka tevatevatāṉam koṭṭiṭavaiyum pañcakkālattu nilattukku meṟkum teṉ
pāṟkkellai varaṅkatevatāṉam tāḷum pulattukku vaṭakkum melpākke
llai nakkaṉ ṅkulamuḷḷiṭṭārum na mamaṭṭiyum nakkaṉ koṟṟa virāṭi
Uḷḷiṭṭār nilaṅkaḷukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟlelai tiruvaraṅka tevatāṉam cā
ntakuṭikkut teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṅkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam
Iraṇṭaraiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttu Iṉṉilattukku vilai kaḻañcāka Ippoṉ Añka
ḻaiñcukkum Iṉṉilam viṟṟukkuṭuttu Ippoṉ Añkaḻañcum paṇṭārattu vaip
pittukkoṇṭu Iṉṉilam cittirai tirunāḷ Oṉpatu ṉāḷum braāhmaṇarum śivacoki kaḷum tapasyarum Uṇṇa
Iṉṉilam Ipparicu kalmel veṭṭik koḷḷappeṟuvāṉāka cūralūr kiḻavaṉ kampaṉ maṇiya ṉāna vikkiramaciñka mu
venta veḷāṉukku viṟṟukkuṭuttom caṇṭeśvara perumāḷ Aruḷāl patipāta mulap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāryya tevakaṉmika
ḷom cinṟampala Ūromum Ivva m paṇikka Eḻutiṉeṉ vaṇṇaka ṇa kuṭu nak
Digital edition of SII 17.442 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
